description: Square graphic for ICE's Law Enforcement Support Center (LESC), in a high-contrast black-and-white style with blue and red accents. The right side shows a black-and-white photo of a man wearing eyeglasses and a telephone headset, in profile, looking toward a screen. The left and background are darkened and overlaid with faint blue digits ('001', '1', '0'). Upper left carries the circular DHS seal and 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' in white. Mid-left white serif text reads 'Sharing timely & relevant information with law enforcement partners' with 'around the world.' in blue italics. The lower-left has the headline 'LAW ENFORCEMENT' (white) 'SUPPORT' (blue) 'CENTER' (white), with three red slashes and the URL 'ICE.gov/LESC.'
notable_text: Sharing timely & relevant information with law enforcement partners around the world.; LAW ENFORCEMENT SUPPORT CENTER; ICE.gov/LESC
